name: Logic Pro – Neon Edition
description: Logic Pro – Neon Edition is an addictive online puzzle game that challenges your brain with classic lights-out logic gameplay. Turn all the lights OFF by tapping tiles that also toggle their neighbors. Plan carefully, think ahead, and solve each level using the fewest moves possible. Enjoy increasing difficulty, smooth neon visuals, best-score tracking, and mobile-friendly controls. Perfect for fans of brain games, logic puzzles, and casual thinking games. Play free online and train your mind to become a true logic master!
instructions: Click or tap on a tile to toggle it ON or OFF Tapping a tile also toggles its neighboring tiles Use your mouse on desktop or touch on mobile devices Use help section for more
